metadata.description: Property intelligence and conveyancing workflow skills for AI agents. Standalone tools plus Moverly-connected intelligence.

plugins.name: sdlt-calculator
plugins.description: Calculate UK Stamp Duty Land Tax for residential property purchases. Standard, first-time buyer, additional property, and non-UK resident calculations.

plugins.name: lenders-handbook-prescreen
plugins.description: Exhaustive UK Finance Lender's Handbook Part 1 pre-screen with 90+ checks across 24 categories, plus Part 2 data for 60+ lenders.

plugins.name: conveyancing-protocol-checklist
plugins.description: Law Society Conveyancing Protocol compliance checklists. Track pre-exchange, exchange, completion, and post-completion obligations.

plugins.name: ca-protocol-compliance
plugins.description: Conveyancing Association Protocol (5th Edition) compliance. Covers delays, enquiries, building regulations, planning, covenants, leasehold, and fraud.

plugins.name: cqs-practice-standards
plugins.description: CQS practice management standards for SRA-regulated firms. Governance, supervision, training, complaints, cyber security, and file management.

plugins.name: clc-compliance-tracker
plugins.description: CLC regulatory compliance tracking. Code of Conduct, ethical principles, subsidiary codes, and outcomes-focused assessment.

plugins.name: moverly-connect
plugins.description: Connect to Moverly's property intelligence MCP server. Transaction data, PDTF state, claims, provenance, document uploads, and form progress.

plugins.name: moverly-diligence
plugins.description: Property risk intelligence and enquiry management via Moverly's deterministic diligence engine. Risk flags, evidence provenance, and pre-contract enquiries.

plugins.name: moverly-upload
plugins.description: Upload case documents to Moverly for automated diligence analysis. Guided multi-document workflows with classification and risk re-evaluation.

plugins.name: report-on-title
plugins.description: Generate comprehensive buyer's conveyancer Reports on Title from Moverly transaction data and diligence engine risk flags.
